label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Airbnb collects identity documents and location data for trust and safety purposes. Heavy reliance on data for matching guests with hosts and fraud prevention. Data is shared with both hosts and service providers. Does not sell personal data but shares extensively for operational purposes. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
